texto: The ultimate aim of all science to penetrate the unknown. Do you realize we know less about the earth we live on than about the stars and the galaxies of outer space? The greatest mystery is right here, right under our feet.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Walter Reisch que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “The ultimate aim of all science to penetrate the unknown. Do you realize we know less about the e…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, stars, science, com foco em science e mystery.
